summary: Track titles are missing from this release, making navigation difficult.
review: The sole reviewer points out that the recording lacks proper song‑title labeling, which hampers ease of listening. No comments were made about the performance or audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief complaint about missing track titles; no information on musical or technical quality to base a higher rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type; reviewer only mentioned metadata (missing song titles).

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were provided in the review.
